## Meeting Purpose

[Troubleshoot Google Search Console (GSC) indexing issues for the vizcom.com site.](https://fathom.video/share/ru1XoZZPBxb79wm6bc-RpnbXKNF-oDGR?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** A site migration from Framer to Webflow broke Google indexing by changing the URL from `https://vizcom.com` to `https://www.vizcom.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/ru1XoZZPBxb79wm6bc-RpnbXKNF-oDGR?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [**Solution:** A live GSC URL Inspection fixed the immediate issue by forcing Google to crawl the new URL, making the page "available on Google."](https://fathom.video/share/ru1XoZZPBxb79wm6bc-RpnbXKNF-oDGR?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [**Action:** Carly will contact the marketing team (Emily/Mara) to confirm Webflow's indexing settings are correct for the entire site.](https://fathom.video/share/ru1XoZZPBxb79wm6bc-RpnbXKNF-oDGR?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Site Migration Breaks Indexing

  - [A site migration from Framer to Webflow broke Google indexing by changing the URL from `https://vizcom.com` to `https://www.vizcom.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/ru1XoZZPBxb79wm6bc-RpnbXKNF-oDGR?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [**Impact:** GSC reported zero indexed pages, preventing the site from appearing in search results.](https://fathom.video/share/ru1XoZZPBxb79wm6bc-RpnbXKNF-oDGR?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [**Positive:** The migration correctly implemented 301 redirects, preserving SEO value from old URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/ru1XoZZPBxb79wm6bc-RpnbXKNF-oDGR?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

### Solution: Live GSC URL Inspection

  - [Carly's live GSC URL Inspection fixed the immediate issue by forcing Google to crawl the new URL.](https://fathom.video/share/ru1XoZZPBxb79wm6bc-RpnbXKNF-oDGR?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [**Outcome:** The page was successfully fetched and became "available on Google," confirming the URL change was the root cause.](https://fathom.video/share/ru1XoZZPBxb79wm6bc-RpnbXKNF-oDGR?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/ru1XoZZPBxb79wm6bc-RpnbXKNF-oDGR?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
      - [Contact Emily or Mara (marketing) to confirm Webflow's indexing settings are correct for the entire site.](https://fathom.video/share/ru1XoZZPBxb79wm6bc-RpnbXKNF-oDGR?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
      - [Resubmit the sitemap on Monday to accelerate crawling and collect performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/ru1XoZZPBxb79wm6bc-RpnbXKNF-oDGR?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [Report any new GSC issues to Kaelan.](https://fathom.video/share/ru1XoZZPBxb79wm6bc-RpnbXKNF-oDGR?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
